contact.title: Contact
contact.lead: Address, phone and box office hours.
contact.address: Address: 132 Ștefan cel Mare și Sfânt Blvd., Chișinău

rules.title: House rules
rules.lead: Viewing conditions at Aurora Cinema Chișinău. By buying a ticket or entering the cinema, you accept the rules below.

sections.title: Hall access
sections.text: Show a valid ticket (physical or electronic) for the date, time and reserved seat. Late entry — only during breaks or when staff allows it.

sections.title: Tickets and refunds
sections.text: Tickets are valid only for the stated screening. Refunds and changes follow box-office/website policy; if we cancel a screening — reschedule or refund. Discounts require valid ID at the checkpoint.

sections.title: Age rating
sections.text: Follow the film's age rating. Staff may ask for ID; refusing verification may mean denied entry under the terms of sale.

sections.title: Behaviour in the hall
sections.text: Keep devices on silent during the film. No filming or disruptive photography. Respect staff and other viewers.

sections.title: Food and drinks
sections.text: Outside food and drinks may be restricted. Items bought at the cinema are allowed where indicated.

sections.title: Safety
sections.text: We are not liable for lost items. Dangerous items are prohibited; staff may refuse entry.

rules.footer: Full details at the box office or on the website. Official Aurora Cinema Chișinău documents prevail if versions differ.
